mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ds_payment_reconciliation_task ( date, channel, status, total_orders, total_amount, platform_order_count, platform_amount, match_count, mismatch_count, detail, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{totalOrders}, #{totalAmount}, #{platformOrderCount}, #{platformAmount}, #{matchCount}, #{mismatchCount}, #{detail}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ds_payment_reconciliation_task SET status = #{status}, total_orders = #{totalOrders}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, platform_order_count = #{platformOrderCount}, platform_amount = #{platformAmount}, match_count = #{matchCount}, mismatch_count = #{mismatchCount}, detail = #{detail}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
